description: Set up Gradle project with libGDX dependencies and verify existing code compiles within the new build system. This creates the entire build infrastructure from scratch.
steps: Create build.gradle at project root with: plugins { id 'java' }, sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_17, repositories { mavenCentral() }, dependencies for libGDX 1.12.1 (gdx, gdx-backend-lwjgl3, gdx-platform natives-desktop). Source sets: main.java.srcDirs = ['src'] to include existing model/controller code and the new view layer.

Run 'gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.11' in the project directory to generate gradlew, gradlew.bat, gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar, and gradle-wrapper.properties. Use Gradle 8.11 for Java 17 compatibility.
Run './gradlew classes' to verify that existing model/ and controller/ code compiles successfully within the Gradle project alongside the libGDX dependencies.
Verify no changes to existing src/model/ or src/controller/ files with git diff.
acceptance_criteria: build.gradle exists with libGDX 1.12.1 dependencies (gdx, gdx-backend-lwjgl3, gdx-platform natives-desktop)
gradlew and gradlew.bat exist and are executable
All existing model/controller source files are unchanged (git diff shows no modifications to src/model/ or src/controller/)
verification: Run './gradlew classes' and confirm exit code 0
Run 'git diff --name-only src/model/ src/controller/' and confirm empty output
